tool_args.label: Malcolm X Blvd Transit & Traffic Improvements – CB 3 Full Board March 2020

payload.title: Malcolm X Blvd Transit & Traffic Improvements
payload.description: Presented to Brooklyn Community Board 3 Full Board on March 2, 2020. Covers B46 SBS background, 2019 project on Malcolm X Blvd from Fulton St to Atlantic Ave, and proposed curbside bus lane from Chauncey St to Fulton St.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Malcolm X Blvd / Utica Ave Transit Improvements

payload.project_name: Malcolm X Blvd / Utica Ave Transit Improvements
payload.description: 2019 priority project identified under Better Buses Action Plan. Includes implemented southbound bus lane from Fulton St to Atlantic Ave (photo enforced) and proposed curbside bus lane from Chauncey St to Fulton St.

tool_args.label: Southbound bus lane Fulton St to Atlantic Ave

payload.location_text: Fulton St to Atlantic Ave, Malcolm X Blvd, Brooklyn
payload.description: 1 block of southbound bus lane, photo enforced. Implemented July-Dec 2019. Overnight parking preserved.

normalized_location.raw_text: Fulton St to Atlantic Ave, Malcolm X Blvd, Brooklyn

warnings: treatment_component.enforcement_authority is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Authority names refer to agency/entity records. Suggested relation: enforced_by.

tool_args.label: Proposed curbside bus lane Chauncey St to Fulton St

payload.location_text: Chauncey St to Fulton St, Malcolm X Blvd, Brooklyn (southbound only)
payload.description: Proposed curbside bus lane allowing buses to bypass traffic and access the bus stop. Overnight parking remains. Scheduled for Spring 2020 implementation.

normalized_location.raw_text: Chauncey St to Fulton St, Malcolm X Blvd, Brooklyn (southbound only)

tool_args.label: Better Buses Action Plan annual targets

tool_args.label: CB 3 outreach: 619 survey respondents, 83% ride bus regularly

payload.claim_text: 619 respondents across CB 3. 83% regularly ride the bus. B46 is 2nd most used route.
payload.subject: CB 3 Outreach Initiative
payload.description: Results of the CB 3 outreach survey

tool_args.label: CB 3 outreach: 5-month effort, 27 venues, 800+ conversations

payload.claim_text: 5-month outreach effort. July-Dec. 2018. Visited 27 venues in CB 3 based on input from CB 3, elected officials, and stakeholders. 619 participants took a survey on their transportation needs. Conversations with 800+ members of the public.
payload.subject: CB 3 Outreach Initiative
payload.description: Scope of the CB 3 outreach initiative
